impact: This proves the daemon can append a narrow supervisor recovery tranche without losing completed history or reselecting a blocked domain task, directly supporting PP&D task-board supervision after blocked work.
summary: Add fixture-first task-board replenishment validation for a completed/selectable-empty board with one parked blocked domain task.
target_task: Task checkbox-125: Task checkbox-125: Add task-board replenishment validation proving a board with one blocked domain task and no selectable tasks gets this narrow supervisor tranche appended while preserving all completed tasks and leaving the blocked task parked.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
